message:
fix(docs): resolve ~16 broken doc links + add bd-6i2s extension tests

Fix all broken intra-doc links across 12 crates that caused Gate 5
(RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo doc) to fail. Fixes include escaping
bare brackets in doc comments, converting private-item links to
backticks, and correcting renamed error variants.

Also add 12 new tests for bd-6i2s (Newer Extension Features):
- JSON: json_pretty object/array/idempotent, jsonb functions available
- R-Tree/Geopoly: area triangle/unit-square, within_not_contained,
  contains_point inside/outside
- FTS5: secure-delete removes/integrity, contentless-delete tombstone

All 6 verification gates pass clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
